items.title: Administrative identities require MFA in the scoped production environment.
items.rationale: Deterministic machine state over a narrow access-control predicate.

items.title: Audit logging is enabled for the scoped production stack.
items.rationale: Deterministic machine state over a narrow logging predicate.

items.title: Security awareness training completion is documented for the current review window.
items.rationale: Documentary evidence with a human attestor rather than a decidable system invariant.

items.title: The overall policy suite is adequate for the whole framework boundary.
items.rationale: Whole-program adequacy stays outside the machine-proof corridor.

note: Synthetic persisted routing artifact for the OpenCompliance prove/attest/judgment split.
